---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, config knob, or integration
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

<!-- What is the user-facing problem this would solve? Who would benefit? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would it work? New config? New API? New CLI flag? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why isn't one of them sufficient? -->

## Impact on existing behavior

<!-- Backwards-compatible? Default-changing? Opt-in? Does it add a new dependency? -->

## Benchmarks or evidence (optional but encouraged)

<!-- If this is a retrieval or chunking change, what evidence supports the proposed change? A benchmark, a paper, a corpus-specific observation? -->

## Are you interested in contributing the PR?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] I can help with review/testing
- [ ] No, just proposing
